name: AltaGas Ltd.
description: AltaGas Ltd. is a leading North American energy infrastructure company that connects customers and markets to clean and affordable energy. The company operates through two primary business segments: Utilities and Midstream. The Utilities segment owns and operates regulated natural gas distribution utilities, serving residential, commercial, and industrial customers. The Midstream segment focuses on natural gas gathering and processing, natural gas liquids extraction and transmission, and export terminals, connecting North American producers to global markets.
